description.overview: An ancient North African sighthound, the Sloughi is elegant and reserved. They're deeply devoted to their families but aloof with strangers.
description.history: The Sloughi originated in North Africa.
description.temperament: Known for being reserved, faithful, sensitive.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their short, smooth, fine coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: An ancient North African sighthound, the Sloughi is elegant and reserved. They're deeply devoted to their families but aloof with strangers.
